threats.title: Cisco Unified CM Flaw Exploited After PoC Reveals File-Write Path to Root
threats.summary: Threat actors have begun to exploit a recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME). threats.title: FortiBleed Targeted FortiGate Firewalls in 110 Million-Credential Harvesting Operation
threats.summary: A Russian-speaking initial access broker (IAB) driven by financial gain is assessed to be behind a large-scale credential-harvesting operation known as FortiBleed that has targeted over 430,000 FortiGate firewalls globally. threats.title: Fake AI Agent Skill Passed Security Scans and Reportedly Reached 26,000 Agents
threats.summary: Security firm AIR built a fake AI agent skill, pushed it through a popular skill marketplace and an Instagram ad, and says it reached roughly 26,000 agents, including some on corporate accounts. threats.title: Trump Order Sets 2030 Deadline for Federal Post-Quantum Crypto Migration
threats.summary: President Trump signed an executive order on June 22 setting hard deadlines for federal agencies to move high-value assets and high-impact systems to post-quantum cryptography. Key establishment must move by December 31, 2030; digital signatures by December 31, 2031. EO 14409 leaves national security systems on a separate track.
